channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 65 Exeter Road, NW2 4SE, 7th April
item.description:
Raised and uneven pavement, caused by tree roots lifting the paving. The surface is uneven and presents a trip hazard to pedestrians. There is also concern that ongoing root growth may continue to spread and cause further damage if not addressed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Exeter Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New Young tree on verge, 7th April
item.description:
Leaning over. Will soon be affecting passing cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Branston Crescent, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass bottle on grass verge of Robin Hood Green, 7th April
item.description:
Bottle appears to have been smashed on Monday evening.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Friar Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 7th April
item.description:
Loads of rubbish has been dumped by the green electricity box top of green it’s all been scattered all over the green all needs a massive clear up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Woodbank Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 7th April
item.description:
More dumping, pile getting bigger each day

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ceres Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter Bin, 7th April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 05/04/26 15:26 Litter Bins – Overflowing Lat/Long - 51.4168121, -0.066551 what3words - saving.pies.again Nearest address - 4 Anerley Park Road, Penge, London, SE20 8BZ Two Reference - 5465375 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 05/04/2026 15:25 Two
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain blocked by detritus, 7th April
item.description:
Drain is blocked at street level but mud etc build up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 140, Maple Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti gang related animal animations painted, 7th April
item.description:
On the left hand side on entering nelson road upper belvedere. On boarding outside wds signs. Offensive gang related spray painted caricatures. This has happened a few occasions over a few years. As the spray painting is the same each time with tags attached. Many thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nelson Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose railings on the corner, 7th April
item.description:
The Railings are loose in their fixing/footing to the ground and it moves towards the tree or leans toward the road. This where the school crossing patrol escorts children across the road to/from school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foxgrove Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items of furniture left on the public pavement at the top of Ruskin Walk near junction with Herne Hill. Have checked and it appears items have been flytipped and do not belong to anyone nearby., 7th April
item.description:
Items of furniture (old sofa and chairs) left on the public pavement at the top of Ruskin Walk near junction with Herne Hill. Have checked and it appears items have been flytipped and do not belong to anyone nearby. These items have been there since about 2nd April 2026.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Ruskin Walk, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead rats, 7th April
item.description:
There are dead rats in the alley
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheridan Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of litter including medical waste, 7th April
item.description:
Large amounts of litter in the alleyway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheridan Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fly tip, 7th April
item.description:
There is a large collection of fly tipped waste that has become home to rats

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheridan Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sewage puddle, 7th April
item.description:
Sewage puddle has been here for 2 months producing a strong smell and no action has been taken to fix it , this is not only unpleasant but also hazardous the sewage accessible dogs and cats have been drinking from it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whiston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin full 3rd time of reporting, 7th April
item.description:
Please empty

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daly Drive, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeat dog fouling Green Walk, 7th April
item.description:
Increase in dog fouling outside 146-150 Green Walk. Both on the pavement and on the drives/front gardens. New fouling appeared today
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Walk, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bottles, 7th April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 05/04/26 15:12 Alcoholic drinks Lat/Long - 51.4098937, -0.0453737 what3words - monks.ozone.yappy Nearest address - 249 Beckenham Road, Beckenham, BR3 4RP Bottles everywhere Reference - 5465325 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 05/04/2026 15:11 Bottles everywhere
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 251, Beckenham Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old kitchen units dumped near bus stop., 7th April
item.description:
I spotted these dismantled kitchen units propped against the hoarding this afternoon. I don't think they were there this morning. As you know better than I, the sooner you can remove them, the less chance there is of copy cat dumping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135, South Eden Park Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised tree, 7th April
item.description:
Another sapling appears to have been vandalised

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eden Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 7th April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 07/04/26 14:53 Fly-tipping Lat/Long - 51.4096239, -0.045359 what3words - fleet.modern.bucks Nearest address - 243 Beckenham Road, Beckenham, BR3 4RP 20 flytip bags! Spread everywhere Reference - 5465283 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 05/04/2026 14:53 20 flytip bags! Spread everywhere
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
